---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: [enhancement]
assignees: []
---

## Problem statement

What problem are you trying to solve? Is your request related to a specific pain point? A clear description of the problem helps more than a proposed solution alone.

## Proposed solution

What you would like to happen.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative solutions or workarounds you have considered.

## Scope / impact

- Which part of the platform does this touch? [backend / frontend / self-host / docs / other]
- Would this be a core (open-source) feature or an enterprise feature?

## Additional context

Mockups, links, or any other context. If this is exam-integrity or assessment related, note any security or fairness considerations.
